title:
Energy Consumption data
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Energy Consumption data
To ensure a comprehensive analysis, I am seeking access to data from the same period across the following categories:

1 Energy Consumption (Smart Meter Data) – Hourly/daily electricity usage trends.
2 Electricity Pricing – Time-of-use tariffs, peak/off-peak rates, and prepay plans.
3 Billing & Payment History – Late payments, arrears, and disconnections.

Format: CSV
I am studying energy hardship and affordability for low-income households in New Zealand, focusing on machine learning-driven optimization of energy assistance.

### Response from Energy Efficiency and Conservation Authority
Status Different agency responsible
Comments Kia ora. EECA does not hold Smart Meter Consumption data, Electricity Pricing rates and plans, or Billing & Payment History. This data would only be held by electricity retailers and lines companies. To my knowledge, there is not a central aggregation of such data that could be shared with you by a government department. Your topic area around energy hardship and affordability is a meaningful one and I wish you all the best investigating it further.

#### Likely Source Agency
Energy Efficiency and Conservation Authority
